Full 12-rule FEED-MERCH audit skill with SQL verification steps, JSON output format, stop conditions, and Double-Agent Rule enforcement
EVS diagnostic skill: impact(0.40) + freshness(0.30) + tier_depth(0.20) + vertical_specificity(0.10). Top-50 ranked inventory + bottom-quartile identification + free-tier check.
FEED-MERCH-09 enforcement: no topic exceeds 40% per vertical. 4-step SQL audit with FAIL/WARN/PASS determination, coverage gap detection, and remediation guidance.
FEED-MERCH-08 enforcement: identifies vague/non-compliant titles and proposes rewrites with owner-approved SQL UPDATEs. 7 rewrite rules covering all banned patterns.
